description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test that runs on every pull request. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12). Set up a PostgreSQL service and create a database. For each Python version, check out the code, install OS dependencies, cache Python dependencies, install credentialdigger and test dependencies, and run unit, integration, and functional tests.
